mapper.select:
SELECT A.GATE_CD , A.AUTH_CD , A.REG_DATE , A.REG_USER_NM REG_USER_ID , A.AUTH_NM , A.AUTH_DESC , A.MAIN_MODULE_TYPE , A.MAIN_MODULE_TYPE MAIN_MODULE_TYPE2 , A.MODULE_TYPE_NM , A.INSERT_FLAG , A.USER_TYPE , ('') AS SCREEN_NM_IMG FROM (SELECT AUPF.AUTH_CD , AUPF.GATE_CD , AUPF.REG_USER_ID , AUPF.MAIN_MODULE_TYPE , (SELECT USER_NM FROM STOCUSER WHERE GATE_CD= #{ses.gateCd} AND USER_ID= AUPF.REG_USER_ID ) REG_USER_NM , 'U' AS INSERT_FLAG , AUPF.USER_TYPE , (AUPF.REG_DATE, 'yyyyMMdd') AS REG_DATE , GETMULTINAME(AUPF.GATE_CD, 'AU', #{ses.langCd}, AUPF.AUTH_CD, '') AS AUTH_NM , GETMULTIDESC(AUPF.GATE_CD, 'AU', #{ses.langCd}, AUPF.AUTH_CD, '') AS AUTH_DESC , GETCOMCODE(AUPF.GATE_CD, 'M006', AUPF.USER_TYPE, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS USER_TYPE_NM , GETCOMCODE(AUPF.GATE_CD, 'M009', AUPF.MAIN_MODULE_TYPE, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS MODULE_TYPE_NM FROM STOCAUPF AUPF LEFT JOIN STOCUSER USERS ON (AUPF.REG_USER_ID = USERS.USER_ID AND AUPF.GATE_CD = USERS.GATE_CD) WHERE AUPF.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND AUPF.DEL_FLAG = '0' ) A WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.MAIN_MODULE_TYPE LIKE '%' #{MODULE_TYPE_NM} '%'
AND UPPER(A.AUTH_NM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{AUTH_NM}) '%'
